q: Do you prefer to use cash or bank services (like cards, online banking)?
examiner_note: Chủ đề này liên quan đến thói quen tiêu dùng hiện đại. Bạn nên phân tích ưu/nhược điểm của cả hai (ví dụ: tiền mặt giúp kiểm soát chi tiêu, ngân hàng trực tuyến giúp thanh toán nhanh chóng). Hãy sử dụng các thuật ngữ như 'cashless society', 'digital transactions', 'contactless payment' để thể hiện sự am hiểu về xu hướng hiện nay.

band7.text: I definitely prefer using bank services like online banking and credit cards. It’s so much more convenient because I don't have to carry a lot of cash with me. Plus, I can track my spending much more easily through the banking app.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, rõ ràng. Nêu được các lợi ích chính (convenient, track spending). Sử dụng từ vựng tự nhiên.

band8.text: I’m a huge advocate for digital transactions. In today’s world, bank services are indispensable for their sheer efficiency and security features. However, I usually keep a small amount of cash on hand just in case I visit smaller shops or vendors that don't accept contactless payments yet. Overall, I think we’re moving rapidly towards a cashless society.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao (advocate, indispensable, efficiency, contactless payments, cashless society). Cách dẫn đạt mạch lạc.

band9.text: In this increasingly digitalized economy, I almost exclusively rely on bank services for my financial transactions. The level of convenience offered by mobile banking and digital wallets is simply unparalleled, allowing for instantaneous payments and seamless budgeting. While I recognize that cash still holds some traditional value and provides a sense of tangible control over one's funds, the security and transparency of digital banking make it my preferred choice for virtually all my expenditures.
band9.note: Sử dụng vốn từ vựng cực kỳ phong phú và học thuật (increasingly digitalized, almost exclusively, instantaneous, seamless, tangible, expenditures, transparency). Cách lập luận sâu sắc và thuyết phục.

v.example: Most people use bank services for their daily financial needs.
Online banking has made managing personal finances much easier.
Banking apps help users track their spending in real time.
The government is encouraging more citizens to use digital transactions.
The sheer efficiency of the new software saved us hours of work.
Contactless payment is becoming the standard for small purchases.
Some experts predict that we will be a completely cashless society within a decade.
In a digitalized economy, data is as valuable as money.
Apple Pay and Google Pay are examples of popular digital wallets.
The speed of fiber-optic internet is unparalleled.
The response from the server was almost instantaneous.

v.meaning: lập kế hoạch chi tiêu mượt mà
v.example: Integrated apps allow for seamless budgeting across multiple accounts.

v.meaning: sự kiểm soát hữu hình (có thể thấy/chạm được)
v.example: Some people prefer physical cash because it gives them a tangible control over their money.
Blockchain technology improves the transparency of financial transactions.
We need to reduce our monthly expenditure to save for a house.
I need to find an ATM for a quick cash withdrawal.
Waiters often bring a card machine for credit card payments.
Your debit card is directly linked to your bank account.
The central bank decided to lower the interest rate this month.
It's a good idea to put some money into a savings account every month.
Most young couples need a mortgage to buy their first home.
He took out a small loan to start his business.
Be careful not to go into your overdraft, as the fees are high.
I check my bank statement regularly to monitor my transactions.
The currency exchange rate for euros is quite good today.
Banks use sophisticated Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư for fraud prevention.
Always protect your personal information to avoid identity theft.
Schools should teach more about financial literacy to prepare kids for adult life.
He has a diverse investment portfolio including stocks and bonds.
The stock market can be quite volatile during a crisis.
High inflation means that the value of money decreases over time.
Wage increases help boost people's spending power.
Have you finished your tax return for this year yet?

v.meaning: ứng dụng quản lý chi tiêu
v.example: Using a budgeting app helped me save more money.
I used to save my pocket money to buy video games.
I keep all my loose change in a jar on the shelf.
We need to pay all our utility bills by the end of the month.
Don't forget to ask for a receipt as proof of purchase.
Some banks charge a high transaction fee for international transfers.
The money was sent via a wire transfer yesterday.

v.meaning: tiết kiệm cho những lúc khó khăn
v.example: It's always smart to keep some money saved for a rainy day.

v.meaning: tiền không tự dưng mà có
v.example: Stop wasting your money; remember that it doesn't grow on trees!
Going on this holiday won't break the bank; it's quite affordable.

v.meaning: vung tay quá trán/tiêu quá số tiền mình có
v.example: The problem with credit cards is that people often live beyond their means.
We had to pay through the nose for those concert tickets.
Inflation is high, so we all need to tighten our belts a bit.
The company has been in the red for three consecutive quarters.
After a difficult year, we are finally back in the black.

v.meaning: khoản tiền tiết kiệm cho tương lai
v.example: They have built up a comfortable nest egg for their retirement.
The high quality of the product is reflected in its price tag.
